description_long: This is a pair of round-lensed eyeglasses with a thin, metallic frame and full rims encircling each lens. The frame features a minimalist, classic design with a straight bridge connecting the two lenses and slender temples that extend back to hook over the ears. The temples are capped with black, slightly curved plastic or rubberized tips for comfort and grip. The lenses appear to be lightly tinted or reflective, giving them a subtle, silvery sheen. The overall construction is lightweight and streamlined, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the frame or temples.
description: A pair of round, thin-framed eyeglasses with metallic rims and black-tipped temples. The lenses have a subtle silvery tint and the design is minimalist and classic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round lenses, thin metallic frame, and straight bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slender temple and black tip, as well as the thin profile of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the full round shape of the lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and its black tip, mirroring the first side.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is round with thin, full rims encircling each lens. It has a minimalist, classic structure with straight temples that curve at the ends and a simple, straight bridge. The temples are slender and capped with slightly thicker tips for comfort.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses have a light silvery-gray tint with a slightly reflective finish, appearing semi-transparent but not fully clear.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a straight, narrow bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible embellishments or nose pads integrated into the bridge itself.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin and straight, curving at the ends with black, slightly thicker tips. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements on the temples.
